archimate:Principle.name: 4. Develop a 4-Helix Ecosystem
archimate:Principle.documentation: The project will establish a 4-Helix ecosystem that integrates public entities, private companies, academia, and citizens in co-developing open-source digital twin solutions. This self-sustaining community will co-maintain solutions, drive innovation, and ensure a steady supply of EU-driven advancements, thus reducing reliance on external technologies and fostering a vibrant innovation ecosystem within Europe.
